title: hapalochilus holochilus
intro: Hapalochilus holochilus, also known as the water hyacinth or river water hyacinth, is a type of aquatic plant. It is a floating perennial that belongs to the family Commelinaceae and is native to Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Hapalochilus holochilus can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, and has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
